# profile permissions

## Static (`profile.permissions.yml`)
- **`administer profile types`** — full control: create/edit profile types, manage their fields,
  and administer all profiles. `restrict access: true` (security-sensitive). Admin only.

## Per-bundle (generated by the Entity API module)
Profile uses `entity`'s `UncacheableEntityAccessControlHandler`, so each profile type gets the
standard generated permissions, e.g. for a type `address`:
- `view own address profile`, `view any address profile`
- `add own address profile`, `add any address profile`
- `update own address profile`, `update any address profile`
- `delete own address profile`, `delete any address profile`

(The exact permission set is provided by the Entity API permission provider.)

## Role restriction (beyond permissions)
`ProfileAccessControlHandler` also enforces the profile type's `roles` setting: if a type is
limited to certain roles, access is denied for the profile *owner's* account when it lacks a
listed role — even for users with the permissions above.
